name: Methyl Orange
plain_summary: Azo indicator dye; colour change with pH makes a vivid classroom UV–Vis demo.

abs.plain_caption: Azo band near ~464 nm in neutral water (pH-dependent).
abs.lit: Teaching multi-Gaussian for methyl orange in neutral aqueous solution (~460–470 nm). pH shifts the spectrum.
abs.quality_note: Tier A teaching spectrum — indicator demo
